nasb.text: you shall certainly let the mother go, but the young you may take for yourself, in order that it may be well with you and that you may prolong your days.

esv.text: You shall let the mother go, but the young you may take for yourself, that it may go well with you, and that you may live long.

cnv.text: 總要讓母鳥飛去，只可以取子；這樣你就可以得著好處，得享長壽。

ccb.text: 你们可以取走雏鸟，但要放走母鸟。这样，你们就会凡事顺利，得享长寿。
